ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used by the model (e.g., U-Net, ResNet-DUC) */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source or publication of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Model architecture (e.g., convolutional, recurrent, transformer) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Model parameters (e.g., number of layers, activation functions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "image_count" INTEGER /* Number of images in the dataset */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the images (e.g., 256x256, 512x512) */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of images (e.g., MRI, CT, X-ray) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "jaccard_index" REAL /* Jaccard Index of the model on the dataset */,
  "dice_coefficient" REAL /* Dice Coefficient of the model on the dataset */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the dataset */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the model on the dataset */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the model on the dataset */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the dataset */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the dataset */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., model comparison, dataset analysis) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new model available, dataset updated) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
